（前面的节奏会比较慢，后面会加快。）
无光的天穹，残破的大地，一切都无不说明世界的腐败。
主宰一切的人类，却在万族的冲击下被拉下神坛。
人道崩灭，深渊降临
万族崛起，异常入世
充满迷雾的偏角，一个人形移动天灾却在此刻睁开了他的双眼！

":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7391750762735485720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情设定都不错，属于纯爽文，可惜结束的太仓促了，但相较其他搞后宫的无脑文属于是很优秀的了。主角杀伐果断但不嗜杀，不受气，看下来很舒服。整体进度属于中等偏快，只是结局仓促(我说怎么只有200来章呢)。适合书荒但懒得看烧脑文的人消解时间。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721028722,"group_id":"7254026415144700967","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢无cp文，无论男频女频，偏好单男，也看双男，","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyEls3isGdh2I9RB9GUrmNwZ3MTzkjGzEBqjRsDXT0Yv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a6e942dc98746eba3d38815f52d05b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702477&x-signature=w4rAHg2nrtV65FzWsgsGLm3dlbY%3D","user_id":"4128014800787995","user_name":"阿久久久"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4128014800787995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254026415144700967","book_info":{"abstract":"无女主+禁忌物+超凡+种族+神明+异常
